name: Plex Sonic Similar Songs
author: lassegh
description: Fetches sonically similar songs from Plex's Sonic Analysis and maps them back to Navidrome tracks

http.reason: Communicate with Plex Media Server API to search tracks and retrieve sonic similarity data

kvstore.reason: Cache Plex-to-Navidrome track mappings to avoid redundant API calls

plex_url.title: Plex Server URL
plex_url.description: Base URL of your Plex server (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:32400)

match_threshold.title: Match Threshold
match_threshold.description: Minimum confidence percentage for fuzzy string matching (0-100)
